prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically discusses climatic and hydrological data related to north-west England, including Cumbria, Lancashire, Greater Manchester, Merseyside, and Cheshire. It does not address or apply to Scotland, which has its own distinct hydrological systems and regional data.
